creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
You cannot build Qt 5.15 declarative against an older (5.14) Qt network -- these parts are developed upstream together, and it's only our packaging that splits these things up.

In particular, 5.15 introduced `errorOccurred()` in QAbstractSocket, and naturally other code in the same 5.15 release of the same product uses it.

You need to update your qt5-network to 5.15 first before building other parts of 5.15.
